title: VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION SERVICES - 211info
text: ST HELENS VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF ODHS Vocational Rehabilitation (VR) assists individuals with disabilities in getting and keeping jobs that match their skills, interests, and abilities. VR services include vocational counseling, evaluation, physical restoration, skills training, job placement, and preparation for independent living. Services are provided in collaboration with businesses, state agencies, community rehabilitation programs, and independent living service providers. 500 N Columbia River Highway Suite 230 Saint Helens, OR 97051 Eligibility: Must have a documented physical, mental, or emotional condition that makes it difficult to get or keep a job Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm (503) 366-8383 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 366-8383 Vocational Rehabilitation INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Documentation regarding disability LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Columbia County Services: Comprehensive Disability Related Employment Programs Job Development * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Vocational Rehabilitation Other Services Offered At This Location: PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - EMPLOYMENT RELATED DAYCARE PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - SNAP PROGRAM PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - SUMMER EBT PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - TEMPORARY ASSISTANCE FOR NEEDY FAMILIES PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - TEMPORARY ASSISTANCE TO DOMESTIC VIOLENCE SURVIVORS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
